description: This file implements a React component for displaying a list of notes with search, filter, and create functionalities. It uses React hooks, Next.js navigation, and react-query for data fetching and mutations.

classes.name: NoteRow
classes.description: A React functional component that renders a single note as a clickable link, displaying its title, snippet of content, and tags.

methods.name: applySearch
methods.description: Updates the URL search parameters to perform a note search based on the user input.
